🎉 Create a Board
Solutions for Healthcare Providers

Foster Connection and Recognition in Care Teams

Improve staff morale, reduce burnout, and support healthcare compliance. Celebrate medical milestones, peer achievements, and administrative successes seamlessly.

Request a Demo

Support Your Healthcare Staff

Appreciation tools designed to handle shift rotation, remote clinical departments, and administrative care teams.

Care Staff Appreciation

Recognize nurses, clinicians, and medical technicians publicly. Celebrate everyday care wins that directly reduce physician and clinical fatigue.

Milestone Recognition

Track residency completions, professional accreditations, and long-term service milestones automatically. Highlight professional growth across branches.

Peer-to-Peer Kudos

Support clinical and non-clinical team cross-connection. Give coworkers a direct way to thank each other and highlight silent support contributions.

Asynchronous Signatures

Enable shift-workers to participate on their own schedule. Boards collect team messages, photos, and media asynchronously across rotating schedules.

HIPAA-Compliant Security

Protect staff data with SSO validation, role-based controls, and secure data pipelines that comply with strict healthcare industry regulations.

Global & Custom Gifting

Offer localized digital voucher rewards or high-quality printed keepsake books. Empower staff to select their preferred reward type instantly.

Integrate with Hospital Communication Systems

Push recognition feeds directly to Slack, Microsoft Teams, or local intranets. Sync staff records in real-time with HRIS directories to manage branch onboarding.

  • ✓ Slack & Microsoft Teams
  • ✓ Workday & BambooHR
  • ✓ Okta & Azure AD (SSO)
  • ✓ Outlook & Google Workspace
WorkKudo
Slack
Teams
Okta
HRIS
Empower your healthcare workforce by introducing lightweight, positive recognition loops that counter care fatigue. WorkKudo fits into demanding shift patterns, allowing medical and administrative teams to stay connected, celebrate achievements, and reduce clinician burnout.

Celebrate Every Milestone

Choose from 15+ occasion templates to start a board. Hover over a card to begin.
